# Distribution Certainty Engine

A single channel is a single point of failure.

Autonomous marketing should build a portfolio of channels matched to buyer state.

## Channel roles

| Channel | Best for | Weakness |
|---|---|---|
| Search ads | Existing demand | Expensive, limited by volume. |
| SEO / AI search content | Compounding demand capture | Slow feedback. |
| Retargeting | Proof reinforcement | Needs traffic. |
| LinkedIn | B2B role/firmographic targeting | Expensive, slower conversion. |
| Meta | Creative testing and demand creation | Intent is weaker. |
| TikTok | Fast creative testing, demos, creator-style proof | B2B fit varies. |
| Reddit/community | Pain discovery and credibility | Promotion sensitivity. |
| Email/outbound | Precise account targeting | Needs list quality and deliverability. |
| Partnerships | Trust transfer | Slower setup. |
| Marketplace/integration directories | Category-ready demand | Dependent on platform. |

## Portfolio rule

Run at least one tactic from each bucket when possible:

1. high-intent capture,
2. proof distribution,
3. retargeting,
4. organic/AI-search compounding,
5. manual buyer discovery.

## Agent rule

Never diagnose a market from one failed channel.

Diagnose the channel first.
